title: oxalis decaphylla
intro: Oxalis decaphylla, also known as the many-leaved wood sorrel, is a species of flowering plant in the family Oxalidaceae. It is a perennial plant native to South America, known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and urinary tract problems, due to its high concentration of oxalic acid and other compounds. The health benefits of Oxalis decaphylla include relief from diarrhea, dysuria, and other urinary tract disorders, as well as potential anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. Oxalis decaphylla can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to treat these conditions.
